response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced Senior Software Developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and focus on advanced technologies (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, high-performance systems) may not align perfectly with the junior/mid-level role. His TypeScript, React, and database experience are relevant, but the role's emphasis on pragmatic, scalable solutions for renewable energy/construction tech may not leverage his recent work.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, matching core job requirements.
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and integrating diverse data sources (e.g., CRM, document management).
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating passion for clean architecture and collaboration.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role; recent roles are at Staff/Senior levels with advanced responsibilities.
Limited explicit experience with PostgreSQL (preferred for this role) and Nest.js, though related skills exist.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current remote-friendly senior roles.
